title: Flamingo - Software update for just charge case
scenario: Software update can be performed for charge case independently without updating the headset on device settings screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Tap the Update button on the device home screen.
3. Observe the Device Settings screen. Expected: The Software Update tab is expanded, showing an "Update All" button at the top and separate "Update" buttons for the headset and charge case.
4. Tap the "Update" button next to the charge case.
5. Complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process as prompted by the app.
6. After the update completes, verify the firmware version of the charge case.
7. Verify the firmware version of the headset remains unchanged.
expected: The DFU process completes successfully for just the charge case. Only the charge case is updated to the latest firmware; the headset firmware remains unchanged.
